title: Skins3D but not cubic
description: Makes skin 3d, but not like other mods
body:
![Image not loading? Click below!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77eea3d817ba865e86d2e7c102b7a02995a3b3a1.png)

<details>
  <summary>Transcription</summary>
  So i just woke up one day and said "o fu- skins look kinda ugly with just a separated layer". Then i tried some 3D skins mod but they look kinda strange and theres a reason: dilation cubes looks strange since they are bigger than head's cubes. Then i found this really cool effect. I know it can look strange when using it, but why not publishing it :3

So here we are, you can configure some stuff in a config file and you can apply changes by just reloading textures!
</details>
